# TC_TARGET_016 access_request_workflow

## 1. 対象

| 項目 | 値 |
|---|---|
| Coverage Group | `component_variant` |
| Goal Component | `access_request_workflow` |
| Goal Variant | `access_request_workflow.submit_request.project_A.API_A.submitted@request_both_auth` |

## 2. 処理概要

project_A / API_A access_request_workflow.submit_request submitted@request_both_auth を主役にする。

## 3. 処理詳細

### 前提条件

| No | 前提 | 補足 |
|---|---|---|
| P1 | Cognito管理API用tokenを取得できる。 | - |
| P2 | case.id suffixでProject/APIなどのテストデータを一意に扱う。 | - |
| P3 | secret値、API key値、client secret値の実値をMarkdownやログに出さない。 | - |
| P4 | `${project_api_key}` と `${runtime_access_token}` はplaceholderとして扱う。 | - |

### Component Variant 手順

| Step | Component Variant | 目的 | 期待 |
|---|---|---|---|
| Step 1 | `api_catalog.publish_api.API_A.published@api_default` | `api_catalog.publish_api` を API_A で実行 | `published` / `api_default` |
| Step 2 | `project_workspace.create_project.project_A.provisioned@project_default` | `project_workspace.create_project` を project_A で実行 | `provisioned` / `project_default` |
| Step 3 | `access_request_workflow.submit_request.project_A.API_A.submitted@request_both_auth` | `access_request_workflow.submit_request` を project_A / API_A で実行 | `submitted` / `request_both_auth` |

| No | Component | Action | Project | API | State | Data | Variant |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| V1 | `api_catalog` | `publish_api` | `-` | `API_A` | `published` | `api_default` | `api_catalog.publish_api.API_A.published@api_default` |
| V2 | `project_workspace` | `create_project` | `project_A` | `-` | `provisioned` | `project_default` | `project_workspace.create_project.project_A.provisioned@project_default` |
| V3 | `access_request_workflow` | `submit_request` | `project_A` | `API_A` | `submitted` | `request_both_auth` | `access_request_workflow.submit_request.project_A.API_A.submitted@request_both_auth` |
